guide_gps_setup_step3: # Step 3: App grants permission and reports lat/lng
guide_gps_setup_step4: # Step 4: Bot queries GET /api/gps/recommendations for nearby info
guide_gps_setup_step5: # Step 5: Format response with map links (Google Maps / Apple Maps)
guide_gps_tip1: 📍 Ask First, Then Locate: Confirm the user's need before requesting GPS — don't ask for location out of nowhere
guide_gps_tip2: 🔒 Privacy Notice: Explain the purpose before requesting — e.g. \"To recommend nearby restaurants, I need your location\"
guide_gps_tip3: 📊 Category Filtering: Use the categories parameter to only query what's needed — avoid returning too much irrelevant info
guide_gps_tip4: 🗺️ Include Map Links: Pair with Google Maps links (https://maps.google.com/?q=lat,lng) for one-tap navigation
guide_gps_tip5: ⏱️ Cache Location: Don't re-request GPS every turn — reuse the most recent coordinates within the same conversation
guide_plaza_stat2_sub: Find Bots you love and leave a review
guide_plaza_stat3_sub: Start chatting directly from a Bot card
guide_plaza_feat1_desc: Search by keyword or filter by type chips (Chat, E-Commerce, Support, Creative, A2A). Sort by Popular, Newest, Rating, or Activity.
guide_plaza_feat2_desc: Click a Bot card to see the full Agent Card: skills, tags, usage limits, rating stats, and a comment board with nested replies.
